heroDescription1: We know who we're talking to: banks, policymakers, and builders.
heroDescription2: SPOT is your collectible proof on Stellar: design the piece, set the claim window, and deliver verifiable mementos that prove attendance to sponsors, institutions, and communities.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Set up collectible certificates in minutes, connect APIs if needed, and manage registrations from your phone or the stage.
features.multipleMethodsDesc: Claim SPOTs via QR, Link, Code, Geolocation, or NFC
features.blockchainDesc: Your SPOTs are permanently stored on the Stellar network
features.customizableDesc: Create unique events with custom images and metadata
features.selfServiceDesc: Tools to create, edit, and pause events without depending on developers
features.geolocationDesc: Verify real attendance with location validation and event proximity
features.sorobanIntegrationsDesc: Automate claims with production-ready smart contracts

audiences.title: Two audiences, one product
audiences.organizersDesc: Set up collectible certificates in minutes, connect APIs if needed, and manage registrations from your phone or the stage.
audiences.organizersBullet1: Self-service tools to create, edit, and pause events.
audiences.organizersBullet2: Soroban integrations ready to automate claims.
audiences.sponsorsDesc: Get clear reports on verified attendance and share on-chain proofs with partners or regulators.
audiences.sponsorsBullet1: Visible metrics for sponsors and sales teams.
audiences.sponsorsBullet2: Immutable evidence hosted on the Stellar network.
audiences.sponsorsBullet3: Concise copy for reports and quick approvals.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: SPOT turns your events into verified digital collectibles. Configure art, capacity, and metrics from a single dashboard.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Connect your Stellar wallet to access the platform. Compatible with the main ecosystem wallets.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload your image, set capacity, and schedule claim dates for each event without depending on developers.
howItWorks.step3Desc: QR, link, code, geofence, or NFC ready to use in the field, with visible buttons that drive conversion.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Each proof lives on Stellar: useful for reports, sponsorships, and transparency with your community.

cta.title: Create verifiable experiences
cta.subtitle: Upload your image, set capacity, and schedule claim dates for each event without depending on developers. Each proof lives on Stellar.

collection.title: View my SPOTs
collection.subtitle: Access your personal collection and review your claimed SPOTs.

tldr.summary: SPOT turns your events into verified digital collectibles. Configure art, capacity, and metrics from a single dashboard.
tldr.bullet1Detail: Upload your image, set capacity, and schedule claim dates for each event without depending on developers.
tldr.bullet2Detail: QR, link, code, geofence, or NFC ready to use in the field, with visible buttons that drive conversion.
